question: How do I install Swift Menu Duplicator?
reference_answer: Install it from Plugins > Add New, search for Swift Menu Duplicator, then click Activate.

question: How do I install Warranty Cart?
reference_answer: Upload the plugin zip under Plugins > Add New > Upload Plugin, then activate it.

question: How do I add Author Profile Blocks to my site?
reference_answer: Install Author Profile Blocks from Plugins > Add New or the block directory, then activate it.

question: What are the installation requirements for EasyCommerce FakerPress?
reference_answer: It requires EasyCommerce active and PHP 8.1 or newer; install it via Plugins > Add New.

question: How do I install the donation router for GiveWP?
reference_answer: Install it alongside GiveWP and the PayPal Donations add-on, then activate it from Plugins.

question: Where do I rename a duplicated menu before it is created?
reference_answer: Use the name field in the duplicate modal; you can also filter swift_menu_duplicator_new_menu_name.

question: How do I enable the REST endpoint for menu duplication?
reference_answer: Authenticate and POST to the duplication endpoint; enable it from the plugin settings.

question: How do I set the warranty length for a product?
reference_answer: Edit the product, open the Warranty tab, and set the coverage duration in the settings.

question: How do I choose which author fields display?
reference_answer: Select the block and toggle fields like bio, avatar, and social links in the block settings.

question: How do I configure how many fake orders to generate?
reference_answer: Set the order count in the EasyCommerce FakerPress settings before running generation.

question: How do I map a PayPal business account for routing?
reference_answer: Configure the PayPal business account mapping under the donation router settings.

question: Why are sub-menu items missing after duplication?
reference_answer: Parent-child relationships are preserved by a two-pass copy; make sure the source menu was saved.

question: Why is the warranty option not showing at checkout?
reference_answer: Confirm the product has a warranty assigned and the cart contains an eligible item.

question: Why is the author avatar not rendering?
reference_answer: Ensure the user has a Gravatar or profile image set, then clear caches after changes.

question: Why did fake data generation stop early?
reference_answer: Generation stops when EasyCommerce is inactive; reactivate it and run the generator again.

question: Why are donations not routed to the business account?
reference_answer: Verify the PayPal account mapping and that the GiveWP form uses PayPal Donations.

question: Is Swift Menu Duplicator compatible with WPML or Polylang?
reference_answer: Yes; translation and language meta keys are stripped from the duplicated items.

question: Does Swift Menu Duplicator work with WooCommerce HPOS?
reference_answer: Yes; it only touches nav_menu_item posts and the nav_menu taxonomy.

question: Is Warranty Cart compatible with WooCommerce Subscriptions?
reference_answer: Yes; warranty products attach to subscription orders without conflicts.

question: Does Author Profile Blocks work in the Site Editor?
reference_answer: Yes; the blocks work in both the post editor and the full Site Editor.

question: Is EasyCommerce FakerPress compatible with multisite?
reference_answer: Yes; run generation per subsite with the manage_options capability.

question: Does Warranty Cart charge customers extra for warranties?
reference_answer: Warranty products are priced separately and added as line items at checkout.

question: Are there PayPal fees on routed donations?
reference_answer: Standard PayPal processing fees apply; the router itself does not add any fees.

question: Is EasyCommerce FakerPress free to use?
reference_answer: Yes; it is a free development tool for generating demo commerce data.

question: Is Swift Menu Duplicator a paid plugin?
reference_answer: No; it is free on WordPress.org with no premium tier required for duplication.
